titleStmt.title: SII 41.167: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 167. (A.R. No. 385 of 1905.) Kāvēripākkam, Arakkōṇam Taluk, North Arcot District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Sundara Varada-Perumāḷ temple at Kāvēripākkam,

p.hi: Vijaya-nagara Vēnkaṭapatidēva-Maharaya Śaka 1514, Nandana, Makara, Purva 12, Hasta (irregular) = 1592 A.D.

summary.p: Registers certain arrangements made for celebrating a festival (in the temple) of Aḻagiyarāma-Perumāḷ. The donors were some adhikāris.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . maṉmakāma
ṇṭalecura veṅka
ṭapatiteva makārāyar
piṟutivirācciyam paṇ
ṇi Aruḷa niṉṟa catā
ṟtam 1000 5 100 10 4 lme
l cellāṉiṉṟa nan
taṉa caṅkacarattu makara nā
yaṟṟu pūṟuva pakṣattu
tuvāteciyum Atta nakṣat
tiramum comavāramum pe
ṟṟa yiṟṟaiṉāḷ kāvaṉū
rvākkai pukkaraṉ nāra
ṇaṉ perumāḷ Aḻaki
yaperumāḷukku Āvaṇi
mātam pavittirat tiruṉāḷ
Upaiyamṉāḷ Oṉpatukku
coḷiṅka paṅkālakki
ṟāramāṉa Ālaippākkat
til koṇṭu viṭṭa Aṉanta
nārāyaṇaṉcūrinārāyaṇa
ṉ tirumālpūrāccaraṉ
Atikāri kaṉṉayavarka
ḷ paṅku mūṉṟu ciṅkaperumā
ḷ rāmarāyar paṅku Oṉṟu rāmacan
tirar paṅku mūṉṟu Āka paṅku
Ēḻum śrīpaṇṭārattile kay
kkoṇṭu ṉāḷ Oṉṟukku
yirupatu paṇam neṟtiyāka naṭa
kkak kaṭavārākavum yinta Upa
yamviṭṭa nārāyaṇaṉukku pa
rivaṭṭam kaṭṭi tiṉam Oru taḷi
kai piracātamum vakaikku
ṉālu paṇṇiyāramum Oṉ
patu ṉāḷum naṭattivara kaṭava
rākavum yinta Upaiyam
cantirātittavaraiyum
naṭattak kaṭavarākavum
yinta kalveṭṭu Eḻutiyamai
kku koyil kaṇakku
taṉmapiriyar perimutal
Ālaṅkāṭaṉ Eḻuttu
tāṉattār nārāyaṇar
tānam rakuṉātaṉ
Digital edition of SII 41.167 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
